name: Incarnate of the Monsoon
description: You have immunity to lightning and thunder damage, your lightning and thunder damage ignore resistance, once on each of your turns when you deal lightning damage you can arc additional lightning damage equal to your Wisdom modifier to a different creature you can see within 10 feet of the original target, and once on each of your turns when you deal lightning damage you can teleport up to 10 feet to a space you can see.
